title: Cultish
author: Amanda Montell
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The word CULTISH dominates the center. Behind it: a crowd of 30 stick figures in concentric rows, all facing the viewer. ONE figure (front-center) is RED — the leader. -->
  <g transform="translate(0 1280)" fill="none" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- A faint floor line -->
    <line x1="-100" y1="320" x2="1700" y2="320" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- 30 stick figures, 5 rows x 6 cols, all facing front, all graphite except the front-center -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5">
      <!-- Row 1 (back) -->
      <g transform="translate(800 60)">
        <circle cx="0" cy="-22" r="8"/>
        <line x1="0" y1="-14" x2="0" y2="20"/>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(600 60)"><circle cx="0" cy="-22" r="8"/><line x1="0" y1="-14" x2="0" y2="20"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(1000 60)"><circle cx="0" cy="-22" r="8"/><line x1="0" y1="-14" x2="0" y2="20"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(400 60)"><circle cx="0" cy="-22" r="8"/><line x1="0" y1="-14" x2="0" y2="20"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(1200 60)"><circle cx="0" cy="-22" r="8"/><line x1="0" y1="-14" x2="0" y2="20"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(200 60)"><circle cx="0" cy="-22" r="8"/><line x1="0" y1="-14" x2="0" y2="20"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(1400 60)"><circle cx="0" cy="-22" r="8"/><line x1="0" y1="-14" x2="0" y2="20"/></g>
      <!-- Row 2 -->
      <g transform="translate(800 140)"><circle cx="0" cy="-26" r="10"/><line x1="0" y1="-16" x2="0" y2="22"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(600 140)"><circle cx="0" cy="-26" r="10"/><line x1="0" y1="-16" x2="0" y2="22"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(1000 140)"><circle cx="0" cy="-26" r="10"/><line x1="0" y1="-16" x2="0" y2="22"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(400 140)"><circle cx="0" cy="-26" r="10"/><line x1="0" y1="-16" x2="0" y2="22"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(1200 140)"><circle cx="0" cy="-26" r="10"/><line x1="0" y1="-16" x2="0" y2="22"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(200 140)"><circle cx="0" cy="-26" r="10"/><line x1="0" y1="-16" x2="0" y2="22"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(1400 140)"><circle cx="0" cy="-26" r="10"/><line x1="0" y1="-16" x2="0" y2="22"/></g>
      <!-- Row 3 -->
      <g transform="translate(800 220)"><circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="12"/><line x1="0" y1="-18" x2="0" y2="24"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(600 220)"><circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="12"/><line x1="0" y1="-18" x2="0" y2="24"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(1000 220)"><circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="12"/><line x1="0" y1="-18" x2="0" y2="24"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(400 220)"><circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="12"/><line x1="0" y1="-18" x2="0" y2="24"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(1200 220)"><circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="12"/><line x1="0" y1="-18" x2="0" y2="24"/></g>
      <!-- Row 4 (front row) -->
      <g transform="translate(600 300)"><circle cx="0" cy="-32" r="14"/><line x1="0" y1="-18" x2="0" y2="24"/></g>
      <g transform="translate(1000 300)"><circle cx="0" cy="-32" r="14"/><line x1="0" y1="-18" x2="0" y2="24"/></g>
    </g>
    <!-- The LEADER (front-center, RED, larger) -->
    <g transform="translate(800 320)" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-40" r="22"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-18" x2="0" y2="30"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-2" x2="-30" y2="20"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-2" x2="30" y2="20"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A red dot at the leader's mouth — speaking -->
    <circle cx="800" cy="312" r="4" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- A faint speech-bubble halo radiating from the leader -->
    <circle cx="800" cy="320" r="200" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2" stroke-dasharray="2 6"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Cultish = group-think. 20 small graphite stick figures arranged in 4 rows, all facing forward, all identical. ONE figure in the front-center is RED, larger, with arms spread (the leader, the source). A faint red dashed halo radiates from the leader's mouth — the language of fanaticism. The word CULTISH (540px UPPERCASE weight 500) sits in the center, on top of the crowd. Brand 'GROUP-THINK' in the bottom-right; pill 'WE · WE · WE' at the bottom — the cult's favorite pronoun.
